## Description
Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Experiment / evaluation script
- [ ] Other

## Related issue
Fixes # (issue number)

## How has this been tested?
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## Architecture impact
Does this PR affect any of the core innovations?
- [ ] LAAG (Length-Aware Adaptive Generation)
- [ ] OES (Orthogonal Environment Sub-manifold)
- [ ] CEAG (Cross-Entropy Attention Guidance)
- [ ] FiLM Adapter
- [ ] Silero VAD / RMS preprocessing
- [ ] Persona extraction pipeline
- [ ] No architectural impact

If yes, describe the change and provide ablation evidence.
